title: Good Habits
description: Empower kids to learn good daily habits through engaging tasks! Shop, learn, and share progress. Good Habits: Fun Learning for Kids! This delightful educational game is crafted to teach children the value of good daily habits through fun and interactive tasks. Designed for kids of all ages, Good Habits makes learning an enjoyable and rewarding experience.
instructions: Mobile Device To play the game tap on the screen and drag to move the elements Desktop To play the game use the mouse click the left button and drag to move the elements
